column3: ["Simulate a significant change in an applicant's OSC without proper CAA or approved organization assessment. ", 'Attempt to implement the changes through the system. ', 'Submit a request for proper assessment of the changes. ', "Wait for CAA or approved organization's assessment. ", 'Receive notification that proper assessment is complete. ', 'Implement the changes in the system after receiving confirmation of proper assessment. ']
column4: ["The unassessed changes are made to the applicant's OSC. ", 'The implementation of the changes is blocked by the system due to lack of proper assessment. ', 'A request for proper assessment of the changes has been submitted and recorded in the system. ', 'The applicant waits for the CAA or approved organization to conduct an assessment on the unassessed changes. ', 'A notification is received indicating that the proper assessment of the changes has been completed by the CAA or approved organization. ', 'The changes are implemented in the system only after receiving confirmation of proper assessment from the CAA or approved organization. ']
